title: ETA adjustment logic
description: Combine base ETA (from Member 1's Google Maps integration) with weather severity.

subtasks.title: Define adjustment rules
subtasks.description: e.g. +10% ETA for moderate rain, +25% for heavy rain/storm, no change for clear weather.

subtasks.title: GET /api/eta/:busId
subtasks.description: Endpoint returning base ETA + weather-adjusted ETA + condition label, using Member 1's live location data as input.
